revision.text:

{{Location | Name=Conway | Guid=3035-8203 | Deck=Conway is a city in South Carolina and the home of Coastal Carolina University. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Coastal_Carolina_Chanticleers | Objects= | Locations=Locations/South_Carolina,Locations/Southern_United_States,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614326-3993291289-conway.jpeg}}

{{Location | Name=Dam | Guid=3035-8155 | Deck=A barrier constructed to hold back water and raise its level, forming a reservoir used to generate electricity or as a water supply. | Characters=Characters/Carl_Johnson,Characters/James_Bond | Concepts=Concepts/BASE_Jumping,Concepts/Water_Current | Objects=Objects/Water | Locations=Locations/Bone_County,Locations/Flood_Control_Dam_3,Locations/Hoover_Dam,Locations/Nevada,Locations/Peak_View_Dam,Locations/River,Locations/San_Andreas | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3657646-7763895261-11481.jpg}}

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:

{{Location | Name=East Lansing | Guid=3035-8234 | Deck=East Lansing is a city in Michigan and a suburb of the state capital, Lansing. It is home to Michigan State University. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Michigan_State_Spartans | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Michigan,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614373-0668496012-images.jpg}}

It is home to Michigan State University.

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> El Salvador is a republic in Central America. Its capital city is called San Salvador.

{{Location | Name=Ellis Island | Guid=3035-8136 | Deck=Ellis Island is a federally owned island in New York Harbor, situated within the U.S. states of New Jersey and New York. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects=Objects/Building | Locations=Locations/Manhattan,Locations/New_York,Locations/New_York_City,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3538683-1658322257-Ellis.jpg}}

<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Location | Name=Empire of the Plant People | Guid=3035-8054 | Deck=An underground civilization beneath San Francisco, California. Also known as the Underground Plant Kingdom, Plant Kingdom, or Plant Empire. | Characters=Characters/Dr_Fern,Characters/Ficus,Characters/Jimmy_50711,Characters/The_Guards | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/San_Francisco,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/7/73970/3464660-3973197202-latest.png}}

Also known as the Underground Plant Kingdom, Plant Kingdom, or Plant Empire.

{{Location | Name=Eritrea | Guid=3035-8307 | Deck=Country in the Horn of Africa region of Eastern Africa, with its capital and largest city being Asmara | Characters=Characters/Yodit_Haile | Concepts=Concepts/Poverty | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Africa,Locations/Desert,Locations/Earth,Locations/Steppe }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Country in the Horn of Africa region of Eastern Africa, with its capital and largest city being Asmara

{{Location | Name=Eswatini | Guid=3035-8001 | Deck=Eswatini, until 19 April 2018 known as Swaziland, is a kingdom in Southern Africa. Its executive capital city is Mbabane and its capital city is legislative Lobamba. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Eswatini, until 19 April 2018 known as Swaziland, is a kingdom in Southern Africa. Its executive capital city is Mbabane and its capital city is legislative Lobamba.

{{Location | Name=Eugene | Guid=3035-8252 | Deck=A city in Oregon and the home of the University of Oregon. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Oregon_Ducks | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Oregon,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3614418-5289097442-shutt.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Eureka | Guid=3035-8324 | Deck=Eureka is a city in the northern part of California, located in Humboldt County. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Humboldt_County,Locations/North_America,Locations/Pacific_Ocean,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/U_S_Route_101 | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3651976-eureka-main.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Federal Hall | Guid=3035-8401 | Deck=Federal Hall was the first capitol building of the United States established under the Constitution. | Characters=Characters/Connor_Kenway,Characters/George_Washington,Characters/Raiden_347,Characters/Rosemary,Characters/Solid_Snake,Characters/Solidus_Snake,Characters/Vamp | Concepts=Concepts/The_Patriots | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Earth,Locations/Manhattan,Locations/New_York,Locations/New_York_City,Locations/North_America,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3794473-17fad1e1-1dd8-b71b-0b4620b96f176ade.jpg}}

{{Location | Name=Fisk Tower | Guid=3035-8120 | Deck=Fisk Tower is a building owned by the Kingpin, AKA Wilson Fisk. He operates both his civilian legal activities out of here, as well as the more shady illegal activities in secret. | Characters=Characters/Ash_Williams,Characters/Bullseye,Characters/Daredevil,Characters/Deadpool,Characters/Kingpin,Characters/Miles_Morales,Characters/Peter_Parker,Characters/Punisher | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Manhattan,Locations/New_York,Locations/New_York_City,Locations/North_America,Locations/The_Baxter_Building,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3514136-fisk_tower_from_msm_screen.png}}

He operates both his civilian legal activities out of here, as well as the more shady illegal activities in secret.

Meade, also known simply as Fort Meade, is an Army installation in Maryland, and home to the NSA headquarters.
